Workshop Session 4
(Sections 13-15)
Escaping The Gap
MODULE 6
Workbook & Example Pack
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 21 --

-1-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
Whereas the last workshop session was about showing your prospect the
“escape door” and inviting them to calmly exit -- this session is where you
take them by their shaky/tentative hand, and lead them through that door
with a greater sense of urgency.
It’s where you remind them of the stakes and reassure them that the risk of
staying where they are is GREATER than in moving forward.
You remind them that based on the new beliefs/agreements they’ve accept-
ed, their current reality is incongruent with who they’ve now become…
On an emotional level, they’ve already crossed an invisible threshold. A
point of no return.
In these closing sections, you encourage the set of real-world actions (ie.
buying and using your product) that are consistent with that emotional
leap.
What You’re Coaching:
All 3 closes are designed to coach one thing - DECISIVENESS.
-- The Upgraded FAQ coaches decisiveness on a more mental/intellectual
level while reassuring your reader that asking those Q’s is actually aligned
with being a buyer (not an “objection” in the classical sense).
-- The “Perfect For You If” encourages decisiveness through self-selection
and self-identification with the attributes of a perfect buyer.
-- The “Final Confident Appeal” helps close the question loop we opened at
the very beginning, and gives your prospect a chance to BORROW courage
and confidence from you as you stand by your product (and their need for
it) with absolute conviction.
All 3 of these (as well as the 2 alternate closes can be repurposed as closing
sales emails during the final 48 hours of your launch or evergreen funnel).
Reference Module 7 of 10x Launches and Six Figure Emails for even more
ways to coach decisiveness.
About the 3 Closes:www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 21 --

-2-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
About:
When done right, your UPGRADED FAQ has the power to counter objections,
position you against competitors, reinforce the big insights and reframes
you laid out in the first half of your sales page, create safety by pre-paving
the outcome, and help them identify as a buyer… all without breaking form.
Each section of the Upgraded FAQ does in fact begin with an objection.
But unlike more traditional FAQ’s, we welcome those objections.
Like a good coach, we see those objections NOT as an obstacle to the con-
version, but as an opportunity to educate, illuminate, and re-empower our
clients to make powerful decisions.
How to Write it:
General Format:
<Headline That Frames Questions/Objections as a Precursor to Investing in
Your Product>
1. Q1: Objection 1: Take their biggest objection - and transform it into their
biggest opportunity.
2. Q2: Objection 2: Take a major fear or objection and use it to point to a
SPECIFIC and UNIQUE aspect of your product.
3. Q3: Objection 3: Bust a major industry-wide myth (sacred cow) that in
turn, empowers them to take action.
4. Q4: Objection 4: Position against competitors or alternatives, and get
BUY-IN on your unique way of doing things.
5. Q5: Objection 5: Use it as a springboard into your fuller USP or ethos.
6. Q6: Answer the “time” objection or another common one.
7. Q7: Springboard into the offer.
Section 13 - The Upgraded FAQ Close:www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 21 --

-3-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
8. Q8: Optional question about your guarantee/return policy.
Editing tip: When reviewing your work in this section, read your answers out
loud by starting each one with “I’m so happy you asked that”.
Your copy should flow naturally from that energy.
1: Indestructible Team by SoulPowered:
Questions your fellow female leaders, founders and CEO’s asked before
saying “yes’ to an Indestructible Team™
1. I want to to do this, but i’m already spread wayyyy too thin. How
much time is this gonna take?
We hear you :)
We’ve also gone to bed and woken up cuddled next to iPhones.
Skipped meals.
And felt like adding “one more thing” to a never-ending to-do list would
wreck this whole game of human tetris we’ve involuntarily subscribed to.
But here’s the thing…
Building an Indestructible Team™ that frees you up from this never-ending
time crunch will take dedicated time and commitment of at least 5-7 hours
per week.
And that’s only an impossible catch-22 if you let it be one.
If you know right now that “business as usual” is unsustainable and a short-
cut to burnout, then we insist that you find a way to block off the time.
On our end, we PROMISE to spare you from any impractical fluff or theoreti-
cal braindumps.
Example:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 21 --

-4-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
Meaning, every hour you invest in designing and implementing your Inde-
structible Team™ will have an exponential payoff.
As a time-starved leader of a high growth company, committing this time is
the most leveraged and valuable way to invest your energy.
2. I’ve been holding off on growing my team (or hiring altogether) cause
I’m scared of adding to my already bloated overhead. Are you gonna ask
me to hire more people?
Maybe. Maybe not.
In Module 2, we’re gonna take an intimate and honest look at both your cur-
rent team make up, as well as the Indestructible Team™ you’ll need to have
up and running in your business to get you to where you want to go.
When we do ask you to bring on new team members, you’ll be equipped with
the tools, frameworks, and trackable KPI’s to GUARANTEE that you’re setup
to generate an immediate and impactful ROI with each new member you
bring on.
Meaning, you can hire and onboard with confidence, knowing that each per-
sonnel decision is optimized for growth instead of just another expense that
keeps you up at night.
3. Isn’t “scale” a function of marketing, sales, processes, automation, etc.?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 21 --

-5-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
Yes.
And marketing, processes, automation, and all other functions related to grow-
ing revenue and expanding impact are rooted in an Indestructible Team of
A-players ready to carry it out with minimal supervision and dependence.
What you’ll install over the next 12 weeks is foundational (and necessary) for
ANY marketing strategy, product development, or opportunity you plan to capi-
talize on.
Unfortunately, it’s also the step that most businesses will skip.
This is your invitation to create the strong foundation and scaffolding needed to
scale in a sustainable way.
4. I’ve read dozens of books on leadership and team building. How is this
any different?
So have we, and we got nothing against them :)
But the mission here is extremely focused and outcome based:
Design and implement an Indestructible Team™ that creates rapid scale and
sustainable growth while freeing you up to work “on your business” instead of
“in it”.
No theories or case studies that will never apply to you.
Just the hyper-specific action steps needed to get your team up and running,
performing at an elite level ASAP.
5. I don’t feel like I’m a good leader. Are you sure I can learn this?
Yes.
Profitable team building and leadership is a LEARNABLE skill. And contrary to
popular belief, you're not supposed to know how to do it “out of the box”.
In fact, the skills that got you to where you are now, may or may not have pre-
pared you to step up as a leader.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 21 --

-6-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
But here’s the kicker:
No matter HOW much temporary discomfort or self-doubt you may be experi-
encing right now, as a woman, we believe you were BORN to lead.
That’s why we’ve designed every aspect of the Indestructible Team to help you
unlock and activate this innate and natural capacity.
By the time you’re done, you’ll not only be at the helm of a thriving, high-per-
forming team, but you’ll feel more fully expressed as the leader you were born
to be.
6. Does this work for both virtual teams and in-person teams?
Yes.
Our clients have ranged from multinational Fortune 500 companies to digital
nomads running the show from a Macbook Pro.
The frameworks, worksheets and training modules ALL include carefully noted
considerations for in-person, virtual and blended teams.
7. Can you remind me of what I’m getting today when I enroll today?
<Payment Option/Order Summary Boxes>
Write Your Upgraded FAQ:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 21 --

-7-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
About:
The “PERFECT for you if” close is about showing your prospect that your goal
is NOT to sell them - but to help them come to the best decision.
In other words, coaching them in, or coaching them out.
It’s all about genuinely being on their side, taking the sting out of decision
anxiety, and creating a VERY real criteria of what makes the perfect buyer
poised to receive the benefits of your product or service.
If you had to place REAL money on the success of your clients (and in reality,
you are)... what characteristics, attributes, experiences, abilities, achieve-
ments would you look for to feel like you’re making a safe bet.
How to Write it:
Sourced From:
67 Golden Questions (Visualization #5)
General Format:
<Headline: You’re Ready to Achieve X Outcome If>
<Headline v2: X# Ways to Know You’re Ready to Achieve Y Outcome>
[P1 - The person who’s just getting started and wants to do it right]
[P2 - The person already struggling who wants to fix it once and for all]
[P3 - Something that exclusively empowers them to use your product or
service]
[P4 - General desirable trait or characteristic. Ie. willing to put in the work]
[P5 - Specific trait to back it up - ie. Already investing 4 hours per work
actively trying to (achieve X)]
[P6 - A big fear or concern that your USP addresses]
Section 14 - The “Perfect For You If” Closewww.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 21 --

-8-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
[P7 - aware of and excited about the big outcome]
[P8 - aware and excited about the Quick and Valuable Win (QVW)]
[P9 - Ready to take the Minimum Viable Commitment (MVC)]
[Criteria Close: ie. If you said “yes” to at least 6 of the above]
1. List Builder’s Lab 2.0 by Amy Porterfield:
Still Undecided?
You’re ready to achieve brag-worthy wins inside List Builder’s Lab if…
1. You’re just getting started with your list building efforts, and want to
make sure you absolutely NAIL IT right out of the gates by using only the
most powerful, easy-to-follow, “what’s working now” list building strategies.
2. You’ve been trying to build your list for months (or even years),
but haven’t attracted the numbers you were hoping for (currently less than
5,000)... and the people you DO have on your list are mostly disengaged
freebie seekers who pull a disappearing act whenever you have the courage
to make an offer.
3. You already KNOW who your audience is: Sure, you may make some
small tweaks as you go through List Builder’s Lab… but for the most part,
you know who you’re serving, and have a good idea about how you want to
serve them.
4. You have no problem investing a couple hours per week as long as
you know that every bit of energy you invest is a strategic and meaningful
step forward in owning a profitable, and consistently-growing email list.
5. In fact, you’re ALREADY investing time and energy doing things
like writing epic blog posts, designing lead magnets, dropping truth bombs
on social media, and other things you keep hearing you “need” to be doing.
Examples:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 21 --

-9-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
Only problem is, without a clear strategy that ties them all together, you’ve
experienced nothing but discouraging “why the heck do I even bother”
results, followed by crippling overwhelm around what to do next.
6. You care about what’s working in 2017, 2018 and beyond: You get
skeptical when others start dishing out list building advice that may have
worked for them back in 2014 when the rules of the game were different
and the world was less noisy. That’s why you appreciate how List Builder’s
Lab teaches you how to use the most current strategies that the experts use
(hello Facebook Live, Instagram Stories, Paid Ads, Pixels, Retargeting, Fun-
nels, Email Sequences, etc.)... without getting too ninja too fast, or making
things inaccessible or confusing for folks doing it all for the first time.
7. You’re aware of all the profitable doors that will open up once
you have an engaged and constantly-growing email list. You know…
profitable JV partnerships, speaking engagements, podcast appearances,
pre-selling your next product, etc. And you’re DOUBLY excited that List
Builder’s Lab includes HOT BONUSES like the “5 Marketing Funnels You
Need to Know” training, that will make sure you know how to elegantly
re-direct your new leads into an automated funnel or product launch that
converts subscribers into sales.
8. You’re excited to try the 3-Step List Building Stacking Method.
Even if you’ve been side-tracked and let down before, you’re currently feel-
ing a wave of renewed optimism, knowing that by this time tomorrow, you
can be plugging yourself into an easy-to-follow yet super effective methodol-
ogy for catalyzing your list growth, and compounding the wins every single
day.
9. You feel confident grabbing your login knowing you have 60
Days to test it out: It’s simple. Either you do the work and experience
more profitable list growth in the next 60 days than you have in your ENTIRE
entrepreneurial career… or you shoot me and my team a quick message
asking us to hit undo on this whole “let’s grow your email list” experiment.
If you caught yourself nodding your head to at least 6 of the 9 points above,
then I absolutely CANNOT wait to meet you inside List Builder’s Lab 2.0
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-10-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
2. Indestructible Team by SoulPowered:
You’re Ready to Generate a Rapid and Sizeable ROI if...
1. You’re a female executive, founder, entrepreneur or CEO whose main
responsibility is the sustainable and scalable growth of a company.
2. You lead a team (virtual or in-person) of ANY size, and worry that
they’re NOT generating the kind of returns you hoped for -- and worse,
frequently causing you stress, anxiety and even resentment rather than
freeing you from them.
3. You’ve been hesitating to bring on a team (or add to it): You know that
building your team is key to scaling up your business, but you’ve been on
underperforming employees, and stepping into a leader ship role you feel
totally unprepared for.
4. You’re courageous enough to make BIG decisions: You’re willing to
invest time, energy and resources to scale your business.
It’s that willingness that got you where you are today.
But you’re also cautious and calculated, and need as close to a GUARAN-
TEED ROI as possible before confidently pulling those triggers - especially
when it comes to engineering and optimizing your team for scale.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 21 --

-11-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
5. You’re already investing in team (or at least you think you are):
Team retreats, skill development, performance incentives… you’re not a
total stranger to these things. You’re actively trying to improve the per
formance and resilience of your team members -- but would feel A LOT
better knowing you were taking the right actions with as little leaked
effort and investment as possible.
6. You’ve had at least two moments this month where you’ve had to
put out a major fire or solve a team crisis that pulled you away from being
the powerful, confident, visionary CEO or leader you WANT to be.
7. You literally don’t have time. Not in a hyperbolic “ya right” kinda way…
but in a real, “I’ve had to eat take out every day this week” kinda way.
And that’s paradoxically why you need this program. As your company’s
most vital asset, you’re being poorly leveraged, and unless things change,
you’re setting yourself (and your company) up for disaster.
8. You’re excited about the fact that in 12 weeks from now, you
WILL have an Indestructible Team™ up and running in your business,
powering your growth, and freeing you up to lead from a place of purpose,
vision, and enthusiasm.
And finally…
9. You’re ready to take 30 Days to give the Indestructible Team™
Experience a fair shot: We’re not looking for half-baked commitment,
but as long as you’re willing to go “all in” for 4 weeks, we GUARANTEE that
you’ll see the visible momentum, tangible ROI, and “why didn’t I do this
sooner” excitement that powers you right through the end of the program.
If you checked off at least 6 of 9 items above, you owe it to yourself, your company,
and your customers to give the Indestructible Team™ Experience a Risk-Free Shot
Write Your “Perfect For You If” Close:

How to Write it:
[Close the Question Loop Raised in Your Top Headline]
[Confirm Your Product as the Mechanism That Answers the Question]
[Conviction Blast: With total confidence, list out the people who need your
product]
1. Indestructible Team by SoulPowered (long version)
By now, you already know that the biggest difference between predictable,
stress-free growth and flatlining profits (with a side order of intense burn-
out) all comes down to…
Your Indestructible Team.
So if you’re still here… let’s wrap up with a lil’ real talk.
If you’re an entrepreneur, executive or founder whose primary responsibili-
ty is LEADING the growth of a fast-scaling company… you need the Inde-
structible Team™
If you plan to bring even ONE new team member on this quarter… you need
the Indestructible Team™
If you’re thinking of letting go of even ONE team member this quarter… you
need the Indestructible Team™
If you’ve been wearing “too many hats”, feel stretched too thin, and are tired
of working “in your business”... you need the Indestructible Team™
If you’ve woken up at least one morning this week in “panic mode” having to
put out the fire for someone who didn’t do their job… you need the Inde-
structible Team™
and...

-- 15 of 21 --

-15-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
Bonus Closes:
Bonus Close 1: The Risk Mitigator:
About:
Risk Mitigation is a function of revealing the true, non-exaggerated risks
(and stakes) in NOT acting -- and contrasting that with the risk reversal (ie.
your guarantee).
The result should be a convincing final appeal that attunes your prospects
to the GREATER risk in inaction.
How to Write it:
[Headline: X % of (immediate identifier) will say no to this offer. X# of Ways
They’ll Experience (pain points)]
[List out the realistic stakes -- and the true associated COST of missing out]
[Close with the guarantee to make taking action the safer bet]
1. Indestructible Team by Soulpowered:
Truth:
75+% of Entrepreneurs, Executives & Business Leaders Reading This
Will “Mull It Over’, Bury This Page on a Chrome Tab and Forget All
About it As The Enrollment Period Closes.
Here are 3 ways they’ll continue to flirt with burnout and stalled
momentum as team members underperform, jump ship, and leave them
to plug the gaps with even more “hustle” …
1. They’ll miss seeing the critical talent and functional gaps needed to spur
and sustain growth, resulting in missed opportunities, straight jacketed
momentum, and mornings spent cuddled up to an iPhone putting out one
fire after another.
Examples:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 16 of 21 --

True cost: A leader’s well-being, sanity, and ability to make her highest contribution.
2. They’ll know they need to hire to scale, but they won’t know who to hire
and when to bring them on to guarantee a smarter ROI with each new team
member.
True cost: Upwards of six figures per year.
3. If they luck out and hire for the right position at the right time… they’ll
experience critical gaps in their onboarding process that caps performance
and creates a crippling disconnect between their hire’s potential and ability
to realize it.
True cost: Your company’s speed and capacity for sustained growth.
But with 30 Risk-Free Days to “Work The System”... Wouldn’t You Rather See
What’s It Like To Become Indestructible?
Isn’t it time you worked on your business, instead of in it?
You’ve achieved some pretty amazing things to get to where you are right now.
But you’re also smart enough to know that what got you here, won’t get you “there”.
This is your invitation to partner with us for the next 12 weeks to…
Design your team for scale.

2. List Builder’s Lab 2.0 by Amy Porterfield:
I’d hate to be a downer, but…
8 out of every 10 entrepreneurs reading this, will “think about it”,
bury this page on a Chrome tab, and then convince themselves that the
status quo is A-OK as they let the countdown timer hit zero
Here are 4 Ways They’ll Continue to De-Value Their Time, Struggle, With
Overwhelm, & Let Hard-Earned Cash Leak From Their Business:
1. With total disregard for the value of their own time (it’s worth at least
$100/hour, no?) They’ll waste dozens if not hundreds of hours over the next
few months trying to patch together a list of random list building tactics that
fail to deliver any traction.
Total loss: About $10,000 worth of their time, and 100 hours they could’ve
spent delivering profitable services or creating an online course.
2. They’ll get discouraged from the small trickle of leads their scattershot
strategy is producing, and in a fit of desperation, throw hundreds of dollars
at facebook ads praying for a miracle.
Total loss: About $1,000 they would have been able to TURN into a healthy
stack of new, ready-to-buy subscribers by following the “How to Get the
Most From a $50-$100/week List Building Paid Advertising Budget” inside of
Stack 3 of List Builder’s Lab.
3. They’ll over-invest in expensive, complicated software they don’t need and
aren’t even in a position to fully leverage instead of starting with the simple,
inexpensive tools you’ll be introduced to inside List Builder’s Lab, and over
$500 worth in Member’s Only Discounts.
Total loss: About $2,000 they could’ve used to upgrade to a fancy new Mac-
book Pro.
4. They’ll be right where they started 3 months from now instead of getting
to sell their services, pre-sell a new online course, or run a profitable joint
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-18-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
venture promotion to a fresh list of new subscribers who have been primed
to take action.
Total loss: Let’s not even go there.
Pardon The Cliche, But With the 60 Day Guarantee...
The only thing you risk right now is spending another second running your
business without a strategic, easy-to-execute list building system.
One that leverages all the modern, “what’s working now” strategies, and
takes you by the hand to execute them with total confidence and precision.
If you’re ready to wake up tomorrow and start…
* Building a powerful list of engaged email subscribers who are ready and
primed to buy your stuff
* Leveraging the most cutting edge strategies like Facebook Live, Snapchat
and Instagram Stories and with total confidence.
*Skipping the confusion and overwhelm by plugging yourself into the 3-Step
List Building Stacking Method which has been engineered from the ground
up to get you a steady flow of brag-worthy list building wins.
Then I can’t wait to meet you inside the brand new List Builder’s Lab

-19-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
Bonus Close 2: The MVC/QVW Challenge
About:
Everyone loves a good challenge.
If there’s an aspect of your product… or a way for your prospect to achieve a
quick, valuable win that on its own would be well worth the investment,
using the challenge close is a good way to end your sales page.
How to Write it:
MVC = Minimumum Viable Commitment
QVW = Quickest Valuable Win:
[Headline: Take the X challenge]
[Remind them of the long term wins / ultimate outcomes of your product]
[Challenge them to make the MVC]
[The resulting QVW]
10x Launches by Ry Schwartz:
Take the 10X ROI Challenge
Sure, in 10X Launches you’re gonna be introduced to the Coaching The Con-
version Method™ which will help you permanently divorce yourself from the
version of “copywriting” you lose sleep over, and instead initiate you into a
brand new paradigm.
One that’s…
… more profitable
… easier to execute
… and falls completely in line with your existing skills and talents as a coach
or educator.
Example:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

maybe, sorta seeing a result.
Enroll right now, watch a few short lessons, and make plans to fire off your
first themeplate within the next day or two.
If you don’t feel like you’re well on your way to 10X’ing your investment, just
let us know and we’ll fire back your investment so that you’ll only have to
scrape together another 8 or 10K to get someone to do it for you.
YES! I’m ready to take the 10X Challenge

-- 21 of 21 --
